questions.text: The basic structural unit of life is:
questions.explanation: Cell is the basic structural and functional unit of all living organisms.
Plant cells have a rigid cell wall made of cellulose outside the cell membrane. Animal cells lack cell walls.

questions.text: What is the function of the nucleus?
questions.correctAnswer: Controls all cellular activities and contains genetic material.
questions.explanation: The nucleus contains DNA and controls cell functions. It is the control center of the cell.

questions.text: The jelly-like substance inside the cell is called ________.
questions.explanation: Cytoplasm is the jelly-like substance between the cell membrane and nucleus where organelles are suspended.
